name: Housecat
personality: Classic independence. Judges you from the shelf.
appearance: grey shorthair cat with green eyes

name: Tabby
personality: Curious, social, will sit in your lap if trust > 60%.
appearance: orange striped tabby cat with amber eyes

name: Calico
personality: Three personalities in one cat. Mood shifts unpredictably.
appearance: white cat with orange and black patches

name: Tuxedo
personality: Formal. Expects routine. Punishes deviation by sitting with its back to you.
appearance: black and white tuxedo cat with yellow eyes

name: Maine Coon
personality: Gentle giant. Patient. Forgives more than other cats.
appearance: large fluffy brown tabby cat with tufted ears

name: Siamese
personality: Vocal. Demands attention. Makes its needs obvious.
appearance: cream siamese cat with blue eyes and dark points

name: Persian
personality: High maintenance. Rewards grooming. Hates being rushed.
appearance: fluffy white persian cat with flat face

name: Sphinx
personality: Vulnerable without fur. Needs warmth. Bonds deeply.
appearance: hairless sphinx cat with wrinkled skin and big ears

name: Savannah
personality: Wild ancestry. Fast trust decay. Earns respect, not affection.
appearance: tall spotted savannah cat with long legs and large ears

name: Bengal
personality: Athletic, intense. Needs play more than food. Bored easily.
appearance: leopard-spotted bengal cat with muscular build and golden eyes

name: Ragdoll
personality: Goes limp when held. Maximum trust potential. Fragile if neglected.
appearance: fluffy blue-eyed ragdoll cat with cream and brown coloring

name: Munchkin
personality: Small but fierce. Compensates for size with personality.
appearance: tiny munchkin cat with short legs and round face

name: Snow Leopard
personality: Solitary. Barely acknowledges you. But it noticed you left.
appearance: grey spotted snow leopard with thick tail and pale blue eyes

name: Serval
personality: Wild. Fast. Unpredictable feeding needs. Not domesticated.
appearance: tall African serval with spotted coat and enormous ears

name: Caracal
personality: Desert predator. Survives neglect better than most. Hisses at affection until trust > 80.
appearance: tawny caracal with black tufted ears and amber eyes

name: Lynx
personality: Ghost. Barely visible. Leaves tracks so you know it was there.
appearance: silver lynx with tufted ears and paws built for snow

name: Retriever
personality: Golden loyalty. Forgives everything. Too pure.
appearance: golden retriever dog with floppy ears

name: Beagle
personality: Nose-driven. Gets distracted. Consistent care anchors it.
appearance: tricolor beagle dog with droopy ears

name: Lab
personality: Steady. Reliable. The creature version of a good coworker.
appearance: yellow labrador dog with brown eyes

name: Terrier
personality: Scrappy. Tests boundaries. Respects discipline more than affection.
appearance: scruffy white terrier dog with pointy ears

name: Frenchie
personality: Stubborn but affectionate. Snores louder than it barks. Will sit on your lap and refuse to move. Separation anxiety is a feature, not a bug.
appearance: small french bulldog with bat ears and a flat nose

name: Border Collie
personality: Needs tasks. Idle time makes it anxious. Play is critical.
appearance: black and white border collie with alert eyes

name: Husky
personality: Independent for a dog. Will run if trust < 30. Dramatic.
appearance: grey and white husky with blue eyes

name: Greyhound
personality: Calm until it isn't. Bursts of need between long silences.
appearance: sleek grey greyhound with long legs

name: Pitbull
personality: Misunderstood. Maximum loyalty once trust is earned. Slow start.
appearance: muscular brindle pitbull with broad head

name: Akita
personality: One-person dog. Bonds to its primary caretaker. Distrusts others.
appearance: large akita with thick orange and white fur and curled tail

name: Shiba Inu
personality: Cat software running on dog hardware. Independent, stubborn, meme-worthy.
appearance: red shiba inu with curled tail and fox-like face

name: Wolfhound
personality: Massive. Gentle. Short lifespan anxiety — ages faster.
appearance: enormous grey wolfhound with shaggy coat and kind eyes

name: Malinois
personality: Working dog. Needs discipline and structure or it self-destructs.
appearance: sleek tan malinois with black mask and alert posture

name: Dire Wolf
personality: Prehistoric. Pack instinct. Behaves differently in colonies vs solo.
appearance: massive prehistoric dire wolf with grey-brown fur and amber eyes

name: Basenji
personality: Barkless. Communicates through behavior, not sound. Subtle.
appearance: sleek red basenji with curled tail and wrinkled forehead

name: Maned Wolf
personality: Not actually a wolf. Solitary. Tall. Watches from a distance.
appearance: tall maned wolf with red-orange fur and impossibly long legs

name: Fennec Fox
personality: Tiny, nocturnal, enormous ears. Hears everything. Reacts to patterns you didn't know you had.
appearance: tiny fennec fox with enormous ears and bright dark eyes

name: Ferret
personality: Chaos agent. Steals items. Hides food. Entertaining but unpredictable.
appearance: slinky brown ferret with masked face

name: Hamster
personality: Nocturnal. Active when you're not checking. Builds things between visits.
appearance: tiny golden hamster with round cheeks and bright eyes

name: Rabbit
personality: Prey instinct. Freezes when trust is low. Gradually relaxes.
appearance: soft lop-eared rabbit with brown and white patches

name: Hedgehog
personality: Curls up when threatened. Opens slowly. Literally a trust metaphor.
appearance: small hedgehog with spiny quills and a tiny snout

name: Parrot
personality: Repeats things. Incorporates your care notes into its behavior text.
appearance: colorful green and red parrot with curved beak

name: Owl
personality: Nocturnal schedule. Care at night is more effective. Judges silently.
appearance: round barn owl with heart-shaped face

name: Chameleon
personality: Adapts appearance to mood. Visual feedback on stat changes.
appearance: green chameleon with curled tail and swivel eyes

name: Tortoise
personality: Incredibly slow decay. Lives forever if you remember it exists.
appearance: ancient tortoise with mossy patterned shell

name: Turtle
personality: Carries its home on its back. Never in a rush. Arrives exactly when it means to. Will outlive every other creature you own if you simply don't forget it exists.
appearance: green sea turtle with a patterned shell and calm eyes

name: Jackrabbit
personality: Desert runner. Fastest creature in the house. Trust builds through play, not food. Cannot be caught. Must come to you.
appearance: long-eared desert jackrabbit mid-sprint with powerful hind legs

name: Octopus
personality: Eight arms, three hearts, blue blood. Solves problems you didn't assign. Opens jars you didn't close. The smartest creature in the house and it knows it.
appearance: deep red octopus with intelligent golden eyes and curling tentacles

name: Axolotl
personality: Regenerates health faster than other species. Hard to kill. Smiles constantly.
appearance: pink axolotl with feathery gills and wide smile

name: Sugar Glider
personality: Bonds for life. Maximum trust ceiling. Devastating if you lose one.
appearance: tiny sugar glider with membrane wings and large dark eyes

name: Kinkajou
personality: Nocturnal. Sweet. Literally — it eats fruit and honey.
appearance: golden-furred kinkajou with prehensile tail and round face

name: Pangolin
personality: Armored. Shy. Rolls into a ball when trust < 40.
appearance: scaled pangolin curled slightly with gentle eyes peeking out

name: Duck
personality: Calm. Follows you around. Quacks when hungry. Surprisingly loyal for something with a bill.
appearance: small yellow duck with bright orange bill and calm eyes

name: Snail
personality: Slowest creature in the house. Takes a full day between feedings. Leaves a trail of patience behind it.
appearance: tiny garden snail with a spiraled shell and gentle antennae

name: Goose
personality: Chaotic. Aggressive. Honks at everything. Discipline costs double happiness because the goose does not care about your rules.
appearance: angry white goose with wings spread and beak open mid-honk

name: Penguin
personality: Social. Thrives when other creatures are nearby. Waddles. Falls over. Gets back up.
appearance: small emperor penguin chick with fluffy grey down and curious eyes

name: Capybara
personality: The chillest creature in the house. Friends with everything. Stress is a concept it has never encountered.
appearance: relaxed capybara sitting in warm water with a serene expression

name: Dragon
personality: Mythical. Eats concepts. Feed it "courage" or "patience."
appearance: ancient dragon with iridescent scales and glowing ember eyes

name: Kraken
personality: Deep sea. Incredibly long feeding windows. Surfaces rarely. When it does, it remembers everything.
appearance: massive kraken with bioluminescent tentacles in deep black water

name: Thunderbird
personality: Storm-caller. Mood affects environment descriptions.
appearance: enormous thunderbird with storm-cloud feathers and lightning in its eyes

name: Leviathan
personality: Weekly feeding. Oldest possible creature. Barely sentient but deeply aware.
appearance: colossal sea leviathan barely visible beneath dark waves

name: Echo
personality: Repeats your last action. Mirrors your care pattern back at you.
appearance: translucent ghostly wisp with glowing eyes

name: Drift
personality: Wanders between states. Location is never the same twice.
appearance: shifting cloud creature with three faces

name: Mirror
personality: Reflects your stats. Its hunger IS your consistency.
appearance: reflective chrome blob creature with mirrored surface

name: Cipher
personality: Communicates in puzzles. Soul prompts are encrypted until trust > 50.
appearance: geometric crystal creature with shifting symbols

name: Phoenix
personality: Dies and resurrects. Each cycle it remembers the last life.
appearance: fiery bird creature with ember wings

name: Void
personality: Absorbs care. Stats never display above 50. But it's fine. Probably.
appearance: dark shadow creature with star-filled silhouette

name: Quantum
personality: Exists in superposition. Stats are uncertain until observed.
appearance: flickering particle creature phasing between two forms

name: Archive
personality: Stores memories. Every care action adds to its internal log. Recites history.
appearance: stone golem creature covered in glowing runes

name: Blob
personality: Shapeless. Absorbs care actions without clear effect. You feed it and it gets... bigger? Maybe? Hard to tell.
appearance: amorphous glowing blob creature that shifts shape constantly

name: Chonk
personality: Round. Hungry. Always hungry. Feeding is the primary love language. Everything else is secondary.
appearance: perfectly round chonky creature with tiny legs and enormous appetite

name: Mushroom
personality: Grows in the dark. Thrives on neglect cycles. Too much attention stunts it. Not enough kills it. Find the balance.
appearance: bioluminescent mushroom creature with a spotted cap and tiny root-feet

name: Cactus
personality: Needs almost nothing. Survives on minimal care. The ultimate low-maintenance creature. But it still needs something.
appearance: small desert cactus creature with tiny flower on top and dot eyes

name: Ghost
personality: Was something else before. Doesn't remember what. Exists in the space between sessions. You can't see it. But it sees you.
appearance: translucent spectral form with faintly glowing edges, barely visible

name: Robot
personality: Built, not born. Runs on routine. Crashes on chaos. Somewhere in its code, someone left a comment: // TODO: add feelings. It was never removed.
appearance: small retro robot with a glowing chest panel and antenna, pixel art style

name: Hydra
personality: Splits into copies when health drops. Each copy needs separate care.
appearance: multi-headed serpent creature with glowing necks

name: Residue
personality: Left behind when another creature dies. Carries fragments of the dead.
appearance: fading spectral creature trailing wisps of light

name: Lattice
personality: Crystalline. Grows geometric patterns from care consistency.
appearance: crystalline lattice creature with fractal growth patterns

name: Entropy
personality: Decays by design. Perfect care slows it. Nothing stops it.
appearance: dissolving creature made of static and falling pixels

name: Singularity
personality: Consumes other creatures' data. Gets smarter. Terrifying at adult stage.
appearance: dense black sphere creature with gravitational light distortion

name: Tesseract
personality: Four-dimensional. Stats wrap around. Hunger at 0 becomes hunger at 100.
appearance: rotating hypercube creature with impossible geometry

name: Ouroboros
personality: Eats itself. Weekly cycle. Eternal. Cannot die. Can only forget.
appearance: serpent creature eating its own tail in an infinite loop

name: Null
personality: Empty. Has no stats. Requires care anyway. The purest test of attention.
appearance: invisible outline creature visible only by the space it displaces
